payload.input_str: {'sql': "SELECT s.Name, s.Location FROM stadium s JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID WHERE c.Year IN ('2014', '2015') GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Location HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.Year) = 2;"}

inputs.sql: SELECT s.Name, s.Location FROM stadium s JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID WHERE c.Year IN ('2014', '2015') GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Location HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.Year) = 2;

payload.result: content='{"ok": true, "row_count": 1, "columns": ["Name", "Location"], "preview_rows": [["Somerset Park", "Ayr United"]], "dtypes": {"Name": "str", "Location": "str"}, "executed_sql": "SELECT s.Name, s.Location FROM stadium s JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID WHERE c.Year IN (\'2014\', \'2015\') GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Location HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.Year) = 2;"}' name='execute_sql' id='6fd51b55-00e0-4120-97e9-eaa3e30e90d9' tool_call_id='P02XUH1IT'

final.final_sql: SELECT s.Name, s.Location FROM stadium s JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID WHERE c.Year IN ('2014', '2015') GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Location HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.Year) = 2;
final.answer_text: The name of the stadium is Somerset Park and its location is Ayr United.
